response: The Jurassic Park star who was also in the Rainbow Warrior is Sam Neill. He starred in "Jurassic Park" and "Jurassic Park III," and he played the role of Alisdair Stewart in "The Piano" and Dr. Alan Grant in "Jurassic Park," a role he reprised in "Jurassic Park III." Sam Neill also appeared in the television film "The Rainbow Warrior," which is sometimes called the Sinking of the Rainbow Warrior.
